holdings.n: S&P MERGER ARBITRAGE LONG INDEX SWAP SOCIETE GENERALE

overview.description: The ProShares Merger ETF (MRGR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Merger Arbitrage index. The fund tracks an index of developed-market equities involved in merger deals, with long exposure to target firms and short exposure to acquiring firms. The fund is net long and hedges FX risk. MRGR was launched on Dec 11, 2012 and is issued by ProShares.
